title: MGN 319 (M+F) Amendment 2 - Acceptance of electronic chart systems for fishing vessels and small vessels in commercial use (code boats) up to 24 metres in load line length (SV-ECS)
body: "Notice to all manufacturers, equipment suppliers, owners, skippers and watchkeepers of fishing vessels and masters of small vessels in commercial use.  This notice replaces MGN 319 Amendment 1, which is now revoked. "

taxons.title: Safe and compliant operation of vessels
